normalizationApplied: Removed exact duplicate model entries within the same category > subcategory > manufacturer branch.
Preserved exact display labels from the source taxonomy for category, subcategory, manufacturer, and model.
Did not rename labels or merge branches beyond the explicit source taxonomy.
source.sourceOfTruth: Use the `taxonomy` object in this manifest and not the SEO sections for form selectors.

exactStoredValues.category: store exact category label from taxonomy
exactStoredValues.subcategory: store exact subcategory label from taxonomy
exactStoredValues.manufacturer: store exact manufacturer label from taxonomy
exactStoredValues.model: store exact model label from taxonomy

cascadingRules.subcategoryOptions: Only show subcategories inside the selected category.
cascadingRules.manufacturerOptions: Only show manufacturers inside the selected category + subcategory branch.
cascadingRules.modelOptions: Only show models inside the selected category + subcategory + manufacturer branch.

validationRules: subcategory must belong to selected category
manufacturer must belong to selected category + subcategory
model must belong to selected category + subcategory + manufacturer
importantNotes: Do not treat subcategory labels as globally unique. The same label can exist under different parent categories.
Do not treat manufacturer labels as globally unique for selector logic. Scope them to category + subcategory.
Use display labels for form values to stay compatible with the source taxonomy.
Use generated ids/slugs only for React keys, URLs, or internal indexing if needed.
